title: Grant-Funded Property Standards — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-06-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Grant-Funded Property Standards'. Presented by Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD). Covers Uniform Guidance property standards for federally-funded equipment and supplies, including title, use, disposition, inventory, and reporting requirements applicable to MSU.
